records.ety: [OE. dettur, dettour, OF. detor, detur, detour, F. dbiteur, fr. L. debitor, fr. debere to owe. See Debt.]

defs: One who owes a debt; one who is indebted; -- correlative to creditor.
quotes: [I 'll] bring your latter hazard back again, And thankfully rest debtor for the first.
In Athens an insolvent debtor became slave to his creditor.
Debtors for our lives to you.
